text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Obstetrics/Gynecology * LGBTQ2+ Individuals 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF INTEGRITY COASTAL HEALTH & WELLNESS INTEGRITY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides specialty medical care and a full spectrum of gynecological services in an LGBTQIA2S+ safe and affirming space. 324 SW 7th Street Suite B Newport, OR 97365 Eligibility: Unrestricted, with a focus on the LGBTQIA2S+ community Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 265-4253 Get Directions Visit Website More Details INTEGRITY COASTAL HEALTH & WELLNESS INTEGRITY
